channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Daniel Tupou achieves hat-trick in milestone 300th NRL game against Parramatta Eels
item.description: Daniel Tupou celebrated a historic milestone in his NRL career by scoring a hat-trick in his 300th game, a rare achievement that highlights his longevity and skill. The match, against the Parramatta E...

item.title: Jobs Resilient to AI: Future Career Opportunities in Key Sectors
item.description: The article explores which jobs are less vulnerable to AI disruption across various industries. In healthcare, roles like pharmacists, doctors, and nurses remain critical due to their clinical decisio...

item.title: Pula Focuses on Tanzanian Legal Battle After Abandoning South African Appeal
item.description: Pula Graphite has decided to abandon its appeal against a South African high court ruling that exonerated Patrice Motsepe from a R3.4bn liability, stating it is not a retreat but a strategic move to f...

item.title: Government to Boost Energy Sector Investment with Reforms
item.description: The Tanzanian government has committed to creating a favorable investment environment for the energy sector, aiming to attract both local and international investors. This initiative is crucial as the...

item.title: Security Lapses and Culture of Corruption Raise Fears at Port Coquitlam Jail
item.description: The North Fraser Pretrial Centre (NFPC) in Port Coquitlam, B.C., faces severe security concerns and a toxic work environment. Staff and former employees report systemic issues including lax hiring pra...

item.title: Traffic Police Educate Students on Road Safety in Dar es Salaam
item.description: Traffic police in Dar es Salaam are intensifying road safety education programs in schools to reduce accidents involving children. Officer Bumu Mwalugenge emphasized that educating pupils on traffic l...

item.title: Pakistan's Counter-Terrorism Operations in Balochistan Result in Significant Terrorist Killings
item.description: State media reported that 23 terrorists were killed in ongoing operations in Balochistan, raising the total casualty count since July 5 to 102. The operations, part of Operation Shaban, targeted group...

item.title: Moses Simon's Struggles with Rangers: Ethnicity and Football Challenges

item.title: Dancing Chief Returns to Nightclub, Rekindles Fan Frenzy
item.description: John Ogilo Migun, the Kisumu assistant chief who gained fame for his viral dance videos in 2023, has returned to the spotlight after being captured on camera grooving to popular tracks at a nightclub....

item.title: Atiku criticizes presidency for silence on Oyo rescue amid political tensions
item.description: Atiku Abubakar, presidential candidate of the African Democratic Congress (ADC), has accused the presidency of spreading false claims about his silence regarding the Oyo State schoolchildren rescue. I...

item.title: Palestinian officials request recognition of Morocco's World Cup victory
item.description: The article discusses Palestinian authorities' public demand for international acknowledgment of Morocco's historic World Cup triumph in 2026. Leaders from the Palestine Liberation Organization (PLO) ...

item.title: Crypto Czar and Religious Scholar Discuss Shariah Status of Digital Assets in Pakistan
item.description: Pakistan's Virtual Assets Regulatory Authority (PVARA) Chairman Bilal bin Saqib engaged in a 'constructive discussion' with renowned Islamic scholar Mufti Taqi Usmani to address the Shariah status of ...

item.title: Man Charged with Overnight Stabbing in Hamilton
item.description: A 41-year-old man from Hamilton has been charged following an overnight stabbing incident in the city. The arrest was made by local police who investigated the crime scene and identified the suspect. ...

item.title: Global and Philippine News Highlights: July 4-10, 2026
item.description: The article compiles a diverse range of news events from July 4-10, 2026, highlighting political, legal, sports, and cultural developments. Key political developments include Senator Rodante Marcoleta...

item.title: Philippines Launches First Charity Bone Marrow Transplant Unit for Pediatric Cancer Patients
item.description: The Philippines has inaugurated its first charity Bone Marrow Transplant Unit at the Philippine General Hospital (PGH), marking a significant step in expanding access to life-saving cancer treatments ...

item.title: Violence erupts in 15 French cities after PSG defeat Arsenal, leaving one fan dead and another in critical condition
item.description: Following Paris Saint-Germain's (PSG) victory over Arsenal in a Champions League final, widespread violence erupted across 15 French cities, resulting in tragic consequences. At least one fan was kill...

item.title: CM Punk and Cody Rhodes Set for WWE Championship Match at SummerSlam 2026
item.description: CM Punk and Cody Rhodes have officially set their WWE Championship match for SummerSlam 2026, marking a significant moment in WWE history. Punk recently won the title from Sami Zayn after a dramatic v...

item.title: Mad Cool Festival 2026 Day Three Features Halsey, Pixies, Cliffords and Interpol Performances
item.description: The third day of the Mad Cool Festival 2026 showcased a diverse lineup of rock and alternative acts, including Halsey, Pixies, Cliffords, and Interpol. Halsey delivered an energetic set with high-ener...

item.title: Bipartisan Housing Bill Passes Despite Trump's Inaction, Sparking GOP Division and Democratic Unity
item.description: The bipartisan ROAD to Housing Act became law after President Donald Trump refused to sign or veto it, sparking mixed reactions from political factions. The bill, which aims to address housing afforda...
